content: User prefers pnpm over npm for package management
Always use integration tests with real databases, never mock the data layer
Auth system uses Passport.js with JWT tokens
Deploy to staging first via GitHub Actions, production requires manual approval
Use vitest as the test runner, not jest
Project uses PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM
Error responses should use RFC 7807 Problem Details format
All API endpoints require authentication except /health and /docs
Use zod for runtime schema validation at API boundaries
Redis is used for session storage and rate limiting only
Feature branches should be named feat/TICKET-description
Never commit .env files, use .env.example as template
The frontend uses React with TanStack Router
CSS uses Tailwind with the project's custom design tokens
All database migrations go through Drizzle Kit
Logging uses structured JSON via pino
User prefers terse responses without trailing summaries
WebSocket connections use socket.io with Redis adapter for scaling
File uploads go to S3 with presigned URLs, never through the API server
Cron jobs are managed by BullMQ with Redis backend
